arts.sum: Eddie Howe says Newcastle are playing with confidence after recording only their second league victory at Old Trafford since 1972.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher slams Ruben Amorim for unforgivable error as Man Utd hit 62-year low
arts.sum: Manchester United were beaten for the fifth time in a calendar month as their horrid December continued with Ruben Amorim's team selection leaving Jamie Carragher stunned

arts.ttl: Newcastle United player ratings as world class star nets 10/10 in Manchester United victory
arts.sum: The opener came after slick work in midfield from Bruno Guimaraes and Sandro Tonali before Jacob Murphy and Isak got involved further upfield. Bruno Guimaraes put in a world class display against Manchester United with 92 touches to win the midfield battle at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Man Utd and Man City want Olmo - Tuesday's gossip
arts.sum: Manchester United and Manchester City could sign Dani Olmo for free, Real Madrid want Trent Alexander-Arnold, and Alexander Isak will stay at Newcastle if they finish in the top four.

arts.ttl: Jason Tindall goes wild as Newcastle United get win Keegan will love and Man Utd fans leave early
arts.sum: With 10 minutes gone, Anthony Gordon slipped the ball past Noussair Mazraoui before finding Joelinton but he shot wide at the Stretford End. As Newcastle started with a swagger, Murphy crossed from the right and picked out Gordon at the back post but he mis-hit the ball and it went wide. It threatened to get worse for Man United as Isak fired home before being ruled offside before an incredible move freed Tonali in the box and the Italian's effort clipped the post.

arts.ttl: Sorry Manchester United slump to another defeat as Newcastle claim deserved win
arts.sum: First-half goals from Alexander Isak and Joelinton earned the Magpies victory at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Kieran Trippier's Newcastle reaction speaks volumes amid Man United injury fears
arts.sum: Our award-winning The Everything is Black and White Podcast is the go-to Newcastle United show to bring you all the latest news, opinion, analysis and nostalgia about the club. The first moment of concern for Eddie Howe came in the second half when Trippier dropped to the ground after appearing to feel a muscular injury.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville Names 'Only Three' Good Man Utd Players Since Amorim Took Over
arts.sum: Sky Sports pundit Gary Neville has named the only three good Manchester United players since Ruben Amorim took charge - Diallo, Mazraoui and Dalot.

arts.ttl: Man Utd eye £40m Premier League star to fix problem position
arts.sum: Man Utd eye £40m Premier League star to fix problem position Man Utd are looking to sign a Premier League star to fix a notorious problem position.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville brands Man Utd worst team in country after 'absolutely brutal' moment
arts.sum: Manchester United turned in yet another miserable performance in the first-half of their Premier League clash against Newcastle as summer signing Joshua Zirkzee was hauled off to cheers from Old Trafford
